tutorial.title: How to Download TikTok Videos Without Watermark
tutorial.step1.title: 1. Copy Link
tutorial.step1.desc: Open the TikTok app, find the video you want, tap share, and choose Copy Link.
tutorial.step2.title: 2. Paste Link
tutorial.step2.desc: Return to this page and paste the link into the search box above.
tutorial.step3.title: 3. Download Video
tutorial.step3.desc: Click the 'Download' button and save the video or music to your device.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faq.q1.a: Yes, SaveTok ID is 100% free to use for everyone with no limits.
faq.q2.q: Why do I have to watch an ad?
faq.q2.a: Ads help cover server maintenance costs so we can continue providing this service for free.
faq.q3.q: Are videos stored on your servers?
faq.q3.a: No. We do not store any videos on our servers. All videos are downloaded directly from TikTok's servers.
faq.q4.q: Where are the video files saved after downloading?
faq.q4.a: Files are usually saved in the 'Downloads' folder on your PC, Mac, Android, or iOS device.
